description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel and crystal embellishments on the bezel for durability, style and comfortStainless steel strap with a press claspSilver dial with silver coloured handsmiss sixty glossy logo across the middle of the watchScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when washing hands or light rainWarranty: 2 years
